description: Scan results exported from ContentRX Figma plugin for triage and eval case creation.

cases.input:
How can I make content quicker to consume?
How can I increase the value?
cases.node_name: How can I make content quicker to consume? How can I increase the value?
cases.summary: Clear, direct questions that guide user thinking effectively.
cases.human_notes: Presentation slide body text. Classified as tooltip_microcopy because short + question marks. No frame-level or file-level signal to indicate non-UI content.

cases.input:
How can I make content quicker to consume?
How can I increase the value?
cases.node_name: How can I make content quicker to consume? How can I increase the value?

cases.summary: Appropriate sentence case label for a UI section.
cases.human_notes: > Slide section header. Classification as ui_label/wayfinding is functionally correct — the text IS a label doing wayfinding. The gap is format awareness, not classification logic.

violations.issue: ALL CAPS text: 'TIME'. Use sentence case instead.
violations.suggestion: Rewrite in sentence case. ALL CAPS reduces readability and can feel like shouting.

violations.issue: Uses all caps instead of sentence case
violations.suggestion: Time

cases.summary: Violates sentence case standard with unnecessary all caps formatting.
cases.human_notes: Chart axis label. ALL CAPS is conventional for data viz axes. Tool has no data visualization content type — chart labels, axis labels, and legend text all get bucketed as ui_label.

violations.issue: ALL CAPS text: 'VALUE'. Use sentence case instead.
violations.suggestion: Rewrite in sentence case. ALL CAPS reduces readability and can feel like shouting.

violations.issue: Uses all caps instead of sentence case
violations.suggestion: Value

cases.summary: Violates sentence case standard with unnecessary all caps formatting.

cases.input: Engagement is a balance between time & value
cases.node_name: Engagement is a balance between time & value
cases.human_notes: Slide header making a conceptual claim. The ui_label is wrong. This is a heading. The reader is learning not navigating.

violations.issue: Trailing period on a ui label.
violations.suggestion: Remove the period. Headings, buttons, and labels don't need terminal punctuation.

cases.summary: Should use 'and' instead of ampersand in descriptive UI copy.
cases.human_notes: Subtitle caption, not ui_label. Trailing period is correct. This is a complete sentence. PRF-03 is flagging the wrong content type. Captions and subtitles don't behave like labels.

violations.issue: Uses title case instead of sentence case
violations.suggestion: Hollywood blockbuster

cases.summary: Should use sentence case rather than capitalizing each word.
cases.human_notes: Correct on the casing catch. Wrong category. This is graph content, not a ui_label.

violations.issue: YouTube is a proper noun and brand name that should be capitalized consistently
violations.suggestion: YouTube video

cases.summary: The brand name YouTube needs proper capitalization.
cases.human_notes: It is YouTube. Not Youtube. The system caught the proper noun mistake accurately.

cases.input:
Tailor the deliverable to your audience
The same content to be shared with different leads groups or forums, but shouldn’t be the exact same.

cases.node_name: Tailor the deliverable to your audience The same content to be shared with different leads groups or forums, but shouldn’t be the exact same. Anticipate what context, formats, etc. might be easiest for each group to consume. Director+ product/eng leads struggle with Figma slides, so it can be worth the extra time to copy over to google docs or slides.

cases.input:
Profile visibility consent NOT required
Privacy settings match
cases.node_name: Profile visibility consent NOT required Privacy settings match

violations.issue: Uses confusing double negative 'consent NOT required' that makes users work to parse the meaning
violations.suggestion: Change to 'Profile visibility consent not needed' or 'No consent required for profile visibility'

violations.issue: Two separate concepts crammed into one confirmation without clear relationship
violations.suggestion: Split into clearer statements: 'No consent needed for profile visibility. Privacy settings are configured correctly.'

cases.summary: Double negative and unclear structure make this confirmation hard to understand.
